stemHtml: On a VFR ATC flight plan, the total estimated time is…

options.a: the estimated time from take-off to landing at the alternate airport.
options.b: the estimated time from engine start to landing at the destination airport.
options.c: the estimated time from take-off to overhead the destination airport, plus 15 minutes.
options.d: the estimated time required from take-off to arrive over the destination airport.
